audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Token accounting and cancellation in durable agent workflows. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 4: LLM Fine-Tuning and Model Iteration Loop: Improve AI Apps in Production. Relevant to Strategy, Tradeoffs & Failure Modes. Matched Strategy, Tradeoffs & Failure Modes on: fine-tuning. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Agentic Software Engineering (ASE): Agentic AI Coding Meets Software Engineering. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent.
